calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-21-2010 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-14-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Jimenez in Propria Persona (Pro Per).

The Court expressed concern with the number of issues with the petition and the ability to bring the Estate to a close. Mr. Jimenez stated that a supplemental decalaration to the petition was filed, that he could adminster the Estate as a Pro Per in a timely manner, that he was now receiving help from an Attorney and a Paralegal in Nevada and that he resides half of the time here in Novato and in Nevada. In addition, he stated that there was no problem with bonding and that the bank accounts were here. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
